import { Observable } from '../Observable'; import { ObservableInputTuple } from '../types'; export declare function onErrorResumeNext<A extends readonly unknown[]>(sources: [...ObservableInputTuple<A>]): Observable<A[number]>; export declare function onErrorResumeNext<A extends readonly unknown[]>(...sources: [...ObservableInputTuple<A>]): Observable<A[number]>; //# sourceMappingURL=onErrorResumeNext.d.ts.map
